name: akcli
description: AI-native KiCad design agent (zero-dependency Python CLI + Claude Code plugin): author and edit .kicad_sch from JSON op-lists with net-diff safety rails, run ERC/design/intent/BOM checks, simulate on KiCad's bundled ngspice, source real parts and fetch datasheets, and import Altium .SchDoc/.SchLib/.PcbDoc — no Altium or KiCad install required.

plugins.name: akcli
plugins.description: AI-native KiCad design agent (zero-dependency Python CLI + Claude Code plugin): author and edit .kicad_sch from JSON op-lists with net-diff safety rails, run ERC/design/intent/BOM checks, simulate on KiCad's bundled ngspice, source real parts and fetch datasheets, and import Altium .SchDoc/.SchLib/.PcbDoc — no Altium or KiCad install required.
